audit_summary.summary_text: This skill provides comprehensive documentation and guidance for integrating Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers into Claude Code plugins. The skill is purely educational/documentation in nature, containing reference files, examples, and best practices. No malicious patterns, hidden instructions, or shadow features were detected. The code examples are all illustrative configuration snippets, not executable code. The skill consistently emphasizes security best practices including using environment variables for secrets, avoiding hardcoded credentials, using HTTPS/WSS, and proper permission scoping.
